problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Transcranial. Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
